title: Villagers' Wand
description: A standalone tool for resetting villager professions and more.
body:
Villagers Wand is a lightweight, standalone tool designed to help you manage villagers effortlessly. With simple controls, you can reset any villager's profession — even after their trades are locked — and make villagers follow you when needed. This mod contains **only one item** — the **Villagers' Wand** — keeping it simple and easy to use. *** ## Features * Reset villager professions, even after trade locking   * Make villagers follow you with a toggleable follow mode * Freeze and unfreeze villagers in place, perfect for organizing your trading halls or keeping them out of the way. *** ## How it Works ### Resetting a Villager’s Profession   **Shift(Sneak) + Right-Click** on any villager (including Nitwits) while holding the wand to reset their profession instantly — even if they’ve locked trades.   > Note: Each use consumes 1 durability. The wand can be used **32 times** before it breaks. ### Villager Follow Mode   **Right-Click in the air** while holding the wand to toggle Follow Mode. When enabled, nearby villagers will follow you like tamed pets. Right-click again to disable.   > Note: Toggling Follow Mode does **not** consume durability — only profession resets use durability. ### Freezing and Unfreezing Villagers **Ctrl + Right-Click on any villager** while holding the wand to freeze them in place. They won't move until you Ctrl + Right-Click on them again to unfreeze them. > Note: Freezing or unfreezing villagers does not consume durability. *** ## FAQ **Q: What does this mod add?**
A: This mod adds only one item: the Villagers' Wand — no other items, blocks, or entities. **Q: Can I use the wand on Nitwits?**
A: Yes, Nitwits can be reset just like any other villager. **Q: How do I make villagers follow me?**
A: Right-click in the air with the wand to toggle Follow Mode. Villagers near you will follow you until you turn it off. **Q: How do I freeze or unfreeze a villager?**
A: Ctrl + Right-Click on a villager with the wand to toggle their frozen state. **Q: Does the wand have durability?**
A: Yes, the wand has **32 uses**. Each profession reset consumes 1 durability. Follow Mode and Freeze/Unfreeze functionalities do not consume durability. **Q: Is it compatible with modded villagers?**
A: Yes, as long as they are registered/tagged as vanilla-style villagers. **Q: Can I use this in my modpack or mod?**
A: Absolutely. **This mod can be freely used in modpacks or mods by others.** No need to ask permission (though credit is appreciated!). **Q: Is it compatible with modpacks?**
A: Yep! Lightweight and non-intrusive. It should slide into almost any pack without issue. *** ## Mod Compatibility * Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer (SMP)   * Compatible with most villager overhaul mods *** ## Support Found a bug or have a suggestion?   Feel free to leave a comment. Feedback is always welcome and helps improve the mod! ***
